headline: TL linehaul rates surge in April, Cass says
summary: Supply constraints are pushing truckload rates to cycle highs, according to data from Cass Information Systems. The post TL linehaul rates surge in April, Cass says appeared first on FreightWaves.

headline: J.B. Hunt sees TL rates climbing 20% over next 2 years
summary: Executives at J.B. Hunt Transport Services said at an investor conference this week that truckload rates are likely to increase 20% over the next two years as carriers restore margins. The post J.B. Hunt sees TL rates climbing 20% over next 2 years appeared first on FreightWaves.

headline: Roundhill's New LOHA ETF Targets 'AI-Proof' Companies With Heavy Assets And Stable Cash Flows
summary: The Roundhill HALO ETF targets AI-resistant industrial, mining and infrastructure companies with heavy assets and durable cash flows.
